description: Device-local reader history lens (localStorage, never aggregated)

attributes.name: limit
attributes.description: Max entries kept in local history (default 25)

attributes.name: no-track
attributes.description: Don't append the current page on connectedCallback

attributes.name: empty-text
attributes.description: Message rendered when there is no history

events.name: recently-visited:clear
events.description: Fires when the reader clears the local history
